---
title: "02_weather"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## rnoaa

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidymodels)
library(rnoaa)
```

## Api Key
```{r}
options(noaakey = "roRDFttsEgctcJuwFGFfxOLlvCYKEYvZ")
```

## ghcnd stations

```{r}

stations <- ghcnd_stations()

stations_sf <- stations %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
```

## Study sites

```{r}
meta <- read_csv("../data/training/training_meta.csv") %>% 
  st_as_sf( coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

sites <- meta %>% 
  dplyr::select(site, geometry) 
```


```{r}
nearest_idx <- st_nearest_feature(sites, stations_sf)

meta$station_id <- stations$id[nearest_idx]
```


```{r}
meta %>% 
  distinct(year)
```


```{r}
stations_unique <- unique(meta$station_id)

weather_data <- meteo_pull_monitors(
  monitors = stations_unique,
  date_min = "2014-01-01",
  date_max = "2023-12-31",
  var ="all")

```
